en: Can you understand fast conversations in English So what are you going to do
ko: 빠른 영어 대화를 이해할 수 있어? So what are you going to do

en: So what are you going to do She's supposed to let me know
ko: 그래서 어떻게 할 거야? She's supposed to let me know

en: She is supposed to let me know When did you buy this flat
ko: 그녀가 알려주기로 했어 When did you buy this flat

en: When did you buy this flat Well how'd you do
ko: 이 집 언제 샀어? Well how'd you do
